curation.synopsis: Long after the Tyranids devoured their home of Sotha and all but annihilated the Chapter, the surviving Scythes of the Emperor scrape an existence from the wreckage of past glories. Sergeant Tiresias leads a ragged salvage team of untested neophytes deep into the carcass of a dead hive ship, hunting for lost battle-brothers or whatever gear can be reclaimed. What they find instead is Commander Cassios, sole survivor of an entire company, locked in stasis since the disaster and convinced that nothing has changed, that the war against the great devourer can simply resume. As Cassios's certainty inflames the young warriors, the bitter Tiresias must weigh the future of a dying Chapter against the hunger for vengeance.

flags.reason: Roster lists format=novel, but sources show this is a short story from the Legends of the Space Marines anthology (2010), re-released as a standalone ebook in 2016.
